packet_evidence.host_response_basis: PktMon component counters at boundary 11 show Rx packets=1 and Tx packets=1 during matched flow.

interpretation.exact_break_point: Wi-Fi client path segmentation / AP isolation / router bridge policy between LAN laptop and Ethernet host. Host ingress/egress on 18080 is working.
interpretation.one_exact_next_step: Disable AP/client isolation on the active Wi-Fi SSID and retest from laptop: curl http://192.168.0.27:18080/PUBLIC_REPO_STATE.json

constraints: Caddy/mirror/sync/NAT/VPN config unchanged in this packet-capture run.
